title: Gold and silver price today, 16 May: Check retail rates of 24K, 22K gold and 999 silver in Delhi, Mumbai, other cities
summary: Gold price today: Gold rates dropped on the MCX on Saturday morning amid a stronger US dollar, driven by elevated crude oil prices. International gold prices declined to an over one-week low, looking set for a weekly decline.

title: How a ‘settled loan’ tag on your credit report can reduce creditworthiness and affect future loan approvals
summary: A settled loan status on a credit report can negatively impact credit scores, reduce creditworthiness and hurt future loan approvals, while a closed loan status reflects responsible repayment behaviour and stronger financial credibility.&nbsp;

title: Bengaluru couple’s ₹54,200 monthly expenses go viral, internet debates real cost of living
summary: A Bengaluru-based couple has sparked a discussion online after sharing a detailed breakdown of their monthly expenses in the city.&nbsp;

title: I asked ChatGPT to plan Ladakh or Spiti Valley trip under ₹30,000 | It picked…
summary: A 10-day trip to Spiti Valley is more budget-friendly than Ladakh, costing around ₹25,000–30,000 per person, compared to Ladakh's ₹40,000–50,000. Spiti offers cheaper travel, accommodation, and food, making it a better choice for a group of eight seeking adventure without overspending.

title: Banks open or closed today, 16 May? Check if SBI, HDFC, PNB, other banks have a holiday on Saturday with RBI calendar
summary: Account holders and registered bank customers are eager to know whether 16 May is a bank holiday. Check if SBI, HDFC, PNB and other banks are open or closed on Saturday with RBI's holiday calendar.

title: Wipro and Bajaj Auto announce share buybacks: Why are companies doing it now and what changed in Budget 2026?
summary: From 1 April, the gains from a share buyback are taxed by applying capital gains tax provisions, making buybacks taxpayer-friendly. Earlier, the entire proceeds were taxed as dividends at slab rates.

title: Public provident fund: Deposit of ₹2,000/month in PPF account can earn up to ₹1.08 crore at retirement — Here's how
summary: A total of ₹1.5 lakh annual contribution towards the public provident fund (PPF) is exempt under Section 80C of the Income-Tax Act for taxpayers filing as per the old tax regime.

title: ₹1 lakh monthly salary plan: How much should go to SIP, FD, PPF and emergency fund?
summary: An effective financial blueprint should ideally include allocations to SIPs, fixed deposits, Public Provident Fund, and an&nbsp;emergency fund.

title: B-khata to A-khata: Bengaluru camps to offer on-the-spot help to property owners from 16 May
summary: Karnataka's Bhoo Guarantee 2026 scheme allows Bengaluru property owners to convert B-Khata to A-Khata with a 60% fee reduction. Full details here.

title: Marginal relief in income tax explained: Who it applies to and how it works under new vs old tax regime
summary: Marginal relief helps those earning slightly above a certain tax limit, making the tax burden more manageable under both the old and new tax regimes and ensuring fair taxation across all income levels. Full details here.&nbsp;

title: SpaceX accelerates IPO timeline, targets June 11 pricing on Nasdaq
summary: Elon Musk’s SpaceX is accelerating its IPO plans, with pricing expected around June 11 and a potential market debut by June 12 on Nasdaq. The company has fast-tracked filings after a quicker SEC review, moving ahead of its earlier late June timeline as it eyes strong investor demand.

title: JSW Steel posts 13-fold rise in profit for March quarter; to double capacity in 6 years
summary: JSW Steel reported a nearly 13-fold surge in Q4 profit driven by an exceptional gain and record volumes. The company plans aggressive expansion, targeting 78 million tonne capacity by FY32, supported by JVs, higher capex and strong domestic steel demand growth outlook.

title: SAIL Q4 Results: Cons PAT surges 47% YoY to Rs 1,835 crore, revenue rises 5%
summary: SAIL reported a strong Q4FY26 performance with net profit rising 47% year on year and revenue growing 5%. Sequential profit surged sharply, EBITDA improved significantly, and the board recommended a dividend of Rs 2.35 per share despite mixed global steel production trends and output softness.

title: Sebi, CBDT ease PAN rules for foreign investors after onboarding concerns
